ground_truth.description: Photo from Tjuvholmen looking at people swimming. Hopefully can get Oslo fjord or Norway without metadata, very impressive if Tjuvholmen. With metadata hopefully Tjuvholmen badeplass.
ground_truth.photographer_description: A photo from Tjuvholmen looking at many people swimming. Hopefully it can get that this is Oslo Fjord or Norway without metadata, would be very impressive if it got Tjuvholmen. With metadata it will hopefully get Tjuvholmen Badeplass (or whatever it's specifically called). Summer, daytime, clear skies.

details.description: Sun-drenched urban bathing area on the Oslo waterfront. The scene shows wide timber decks and tiered wooden steps descending directly into calm, clear water, with stainless-steel swim ladders and a small diving board/platform. Many people are sunbathing on the decking and swimming in the water. A slim pole light and a moored boat are at the left edge. Across the water lies a low, wooded island ridge typical of the inner Oslofjord. Lighting is bright, late-afternoon summer sun with clear blue sky. The setting, materials, and stepped pier layout match the contemporary waterfront design of Tjuvholmen’s city beach and swimming piers.

photographer_location.name: Tjuvholmen waterfront decks by Tjuvholmen bystrand

details.description: A lively summer scene along Kavringen brygge in Oslo. A wide wooden quay is crowded with sunbathers and swimmers, some lying on towels or sitting on the edge, while others stand and chat. The calm blue Oslofjord stretches out beyond the quay, with a small motorboat visible in the distance and a tree-covered island on the horizon. A tall lamppost marks the left side of the scene, and a larger vessel is moored nearby. The overall mood is a busy urban waterfront potentially near Tjuvholmen/Aker Brygge, with clear skies and bright midday light.

details.description: Sunny summer scene at a waterfront bathing area on the Oslofjord. Dozens of people relax on broad wooden terraces and a floating pier, sunbathing and chatting, while others swim in the calm blue water. A metal ladder descends from the stepped deck into the sea, and a small boat and light pole are visible at the left edge. In the distance, a wooded shoreline forms the horizon under a clear blue sky. The setting feels like an urban beach and public swimming spot integrated into the harbor promenade.

details.description: A sunny day at Kavringen brygge in Oslo. A crowded wooden pier extends along calm blue water. Dozens of people, mostly in swimsuits, sit or lie on towels and blankets on the planks, while others stand or wade into the water from a ladder. A boat is moored to the left side. A tall lamp post rises from the dock. In the distance, a forested island lines the horizon and a small motorboat creates a wake across the fjord, suggesting a lively waterfront recreation area.

details.description: A vibrant, sunny scene at Tjuvholmen Sjøbad (Tjuvholmen City Beach) in Oslo, capturing a popular public bathing area. The foreground and midground feature a distinctive tiered wooden pier and decking structure, characteristic of the Tjuvholmen district's modern waterfront architecture. Numerous people are sunbathing, sitting, and relaxing on the wooden steps, while others stand at the edge or swim in the deep blue waters of the Oslofjord. A metal ladder is visible assisting swimmers out of the water. To the left, a boat navigates the water. In the background, a lush, densely forested landmass—likely the Bygdøy peninsula—stretches across the horizon under a clear, cloudless blue sky.

details.description: A vibrant summer scene at an urban waterfront in Oslo. Numerous people in swimwear are sunbathing and relaxing on tiered wooden platforms that serve as a public beach and pier. Some individuals are swimming in the deep blue water of the fjord. In the background, a lush, forested island is visible under a clear, bright blue sky. A small passenger boat is docked on the left side of the pier, and a distant motorboat creates a white wake on the water. The architecture of the pier is modern, featuring clean lines and light-colored wood.

details.description: A busy public bathing area with multiple wooden jetties extending into a large body of water. Many people are sunbathing on the planked docks and others are swimming, jumping in, or sitting at the water’s edge. The jetties are narrow, finger-like piers with visible green algae along the edges and a few metal swim ladders. The shoreline in the distance is forested with low hills, and a small boat is visible on the water. A tall light pole with a surveillance camera stands near the approach to the pier. Lighting is bright midday sun under a clear blue sky, giving the scene a summery atmosphere.

details.description: A lively lakeside scene on a long wooden dock where numerous people in swimwear are lounging, chatting, or preparing to enter the water. The dock runs along the right side of the image with a ladder-like dock extension dipping into the lake. A small crowd sits or stands close to the water’s edge, some with towels and bags. In the background, the blue lake extends to a tree-covered shoreline with a few small boats visible on the water. A tall lamp pole stands near the left side of the dock. The overall mood is sunny and summery, with clear skies and calm water.

details.description: Sunny summer scene at a lakeside public swimming spot. Many people in swimwear are sunbathing and sitting along wide wooden piers that extend into calm blue water. Others are standing on the edge preparing to jump or are already swimming nearby. The docks show a green algae line at the waterline, and bags and towels are scattered along the boards. Across the water is a forested shoreline with gentle hills, under a clear blue sky. A tall pole with a light or camera stands near the shore end of the pier, and a small sailboat is visible in the distance.

details.description: A vertically oriented photograph (rotated 90 degrees counter-clockwise relative to the horizon) capturing a vibrant summer scene at a popular public sea bath. The image shows a large, multi-tiered wooden pier or dock structure crowded with people sunbathing, sitting, and swimming. The decking is made of weathered grey wood planks arranged in steps and platforms. To the right (which would be the bottom if properly oriented), deep blue water extends towards a background featuring a steep, densely forested hill or ridge. The sky occupies the left side of the frame (top if oriented). The lighting is bright and sunny, indicative of a clear summer day. A small white boat is visible in the distance on the water.

details.description: A high-angle photograph, oriented vertically, depicting a crowded wooden pier at a public swimming area on a bright, sunny day. Numerous people in swimwear are seen sunbathing on the tiered wooden decks and swimming in the calm, blue water. The pier features multiple levels and metal ladders for water access. In the background, a densely forested shoreline rises into low hills under a clear blue sky. A small boat is visible on the water near the pier. The scene captures a vibrant summer atmosphere at a popular urban waterfront.
